## What's Changed
* feat: RFC 9218 by @hendriknielaender in https://github.com/hendriknielaender/http2.zig/pull/39

releases.name: v0.0.2
releases.body:
## What's Changed
* ci: add job for HTTP/2 conformance testing with h2spec by @hendriknielaender in https://github.com/hendriknielaender/http2.zig/pull/15
* feat: refactor http2 lib by @hendriknielaender in https://github.com/hendriknielaender/http2.zig/pull/33
* refactor: use libxev by @hendriknielaender in https://github.com/hendriknielaender/http2.zig/pull/35
* feat: migrate to zig 0.15.2 by @hendriknielaender in https://github.com/hendriknielaender/http2.zig/pull/38


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/hendriknielaender/http2.zig/commits/v0.0.2
